author: mark
text: MIGRATION ITEM (from bl-8452, resolved 2026-05-31, session: Repairman): old `plugins:` config list -> new model has no list. Migration must translate each old {name,path} entry into (a) committed op-phase symlinks config/plugins/<op>.{pre,post}/NN-<name> -> ../bin/<name> for the ops the plugin declares via `<plugin> protocol`, and (b) a local gitignored bin/<name> -> <path> stitch on each machine. See bl-2e26 §6 note.
